commands.name: build
commands.description: Build the game into a client/server module.

options.name: --client
options.description:
Whether to compile the client component of the
application (orchestrate the NPM Build command.)

options.name: --assets
options.description:
Whether to convert / compile assets (required whenever
graphics / audio changes.)

options.name: --logic
options.description:
(Default: false) Build and compile the logic / maps
associated to the game.

options.name: --glob
options.description:
(Default: false) Preprocess only. Skip code compile
process

options.name: --skip-source-map
options.description: (Default: false) Do not embed DML Source maps.

commands.name: build-glob
commands.description: Build the logic for a preprocessor output glob file. Useful if you want to break preprocessing and compilation into separate steps.

options.name: --glob
options.description: Required. Path to glob file. Binaries will be placed adjacently.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new project using scaffolding.

options.name: --template
options.description:
Name of the template to use when generating the project
files.

options.name: --destination
options.description:
Where the project is created. Defaults to the current working
directory.

options.name: --merge
options.description:
(Default: false) Merge templates against the current
directory structure (not recommended.)

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run the game server & optionally the client as well.

options.name: --client
options.description: (Default: false) Manage hosting of the client application

options.name: --urls
options.description: Urls to host game server on
